title: Governed agents: Looker + MCP explained
summary: Google Cloud demonstrates how Looker's semantic layer, the Model Context Protocol, and the Agent Development Kit enable LLMs to query data through validated business models rather than direct SQL generation. The Looker MCP Server bridges LLMs to enterprise data governance.
